ddls:
CREATE TABLE "package_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the project the import is associated with */,
  "parent_package" TEXT /* Name of the parent package being imported */,
  "field" TEXT /* Specific field within the parent package */,
  "imports" TEXT /* Description of what is being imported from the parent package */,
  "import_methods" TEXT /* Methods used for importing from the parent package */,
  "import_classes" TEXT /* Classes defined in the parent package that are imported */,
  "required_packages" INTEGER /* Number of required packages that the parent package depends on */,
  "heaviness_from_parent" INTEGER /* Heaviness score indicating resource consumption from the parent package */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the parent package being imported */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date when the import was made */,
  "imported_by" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user who made the import */,
  "import_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the import */,
  "performance_impact" TEXT /* Performance impact of the import */,
  "dependency_tree" TEXT /* JSON representation of the dependency tree for the imported package */,
  "is_optimized" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the import has been optimized for performance */,
  "optimization_details" TEXT /* Details about the optimization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user who created the project */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user who last modified the project */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the developer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the developer */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the developer */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the dependency */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the package */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the package */,
  "dependency_count" INTEGER /* Number of dependencies the package has */,
  "heaviness_score" INTEGER /* Heaviness score indicating resource consumption */,
  "dependency_tree" TEXT /* JSON representation of the dependency tree */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the dependency information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the performance log */,
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the import entry */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance log was recorded */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage of the project after the import */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage of the project after the import */,
  "load_time" REAL /* Load time of the project after the import */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* JSON object containing additional performance metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
